tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Way You Make Me Feel

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Fsus4[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                 [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Another day has gone, I'm still all alone,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]                   [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
how could this be, you're not here with me.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You never said goodbye, someone tell me why,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cm7[/ch]                      [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
did you have to go, and leave my world so cold?[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Ab6[/ch]             [ch]G7[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Everyday I sit and ask myself : How did love slip away ?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]                          [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
Something whispers in my ear and says that...[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You are not alone, I am here with you.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
though you're far away, I am here to stay.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]
But you are not alone, I am here with you,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cm7[/ch]                      [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
though we're far apart, you're always in my heart,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
but you are not alone.[/tab]

( [ch]F#maj7[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]F#[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F#maj7[/ch] [ch]F7sus4[/ch] )

[Verse 2]
[tab]               [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Just the other night I thought I heard you cry,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]                 [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
asking me to come, and hold you in my arms.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
I can hear your prayers, your burdens I will bear,[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]                   [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
but first I need your hand, then forever can begin.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Ab6[/ch]             [ch]G7[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Everyday I sit and ask myself : How did love slip away ?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]                           [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
Something whispers in my ear and says that...[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You are not alone, I am here with you.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
though you're far away, I am here to stay.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
But you are not alone, I am here with you,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cm7[/ch]                      [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
though we're far apart, you're always in my heart,[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]      [ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]F#[/ch]
Oh, whisper three words[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
And I'll come running, fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#maj7[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]F#[/ch]
And girl you know[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F7sus4[/ch]        [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]
That I'll be there, I'll be there[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
You are not alone, I am here with you.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]G7sus4[/ch]
though you're far away, I am here to stay.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]
But you are not alone, I am here with you,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]G7sus4[/ch]
though we're far apart, you're always in my heart,[/tab]

[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You are not alone, I am here with you.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
though you're far away, I am here to stay.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
But you are not alone, I am here with you,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
though we're far apart, you're always in my heart,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
but you are not alone.[/tab]

[Ending]
( [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] ) (2x)
